mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_outbox_events (event_type, payload, status, retry_count, error_message, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{eventType}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_outbox_events SET status = 'FAILED', retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, payload, status, retry_count, error_message, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rag_outbox_events WHERE status IN ('NEW', 'FAILED') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) AND retry_count < 10 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
